turn3_answers.Q1: An exact count of detent positions (dots) around each knob is not possible from the image due to resolution and partial obscuring by the knobs. However, for the function knobs, approximately 7-8 distinct positions (including 'OFF' and various symbols) are visible. For the temperature knobs, approximately 9-11 small dots are visible along the arc, marking temperature increments from 'OFF' to what appears to be a maximum setting.
turn3_answers.Q2: The door hinges are not visible in the image, therefore it is not possible to determine if they are spring-loaded or counterbalanced from visual inspection. No visible spring mechanisms or gas struts can be seen.
